meta.title: Golden Beauty Studio — Sabaneta
meta.description: Specialist nail studio in Sabaneta, Antioquia. Acrylic, polygel, builder gel and dipping by appointment.

hero.body: We specialize in nails with flawless finishes and a premium experience that blends beauty, elegance and care into every appointment. -More than nails, we craft details that elevate your essence-

lookbook.body: A selection of recent pieces. Each look notes the technique used and the artist's name. Tap any image to see it in detail.

servicios.body: Listed prices and times apply to simple designs up to length #3. Other lengths, complex designs and nail art are quoted separately before your appointment.

acrylic-refill.name: Acrylic refill
acrylic-refill.desc: 3 refills per build, every 21 days max

polygel-refill.name: Polygel refill
polygel-refill.desc: 3 refills per build, every 21 days max

builder-gel-refill.name: Builder gel refill
builder-gel-refill.desc: 3 refills per build, every 21 days max

system-removal.name: External system removal
system-removal.desc: Waived on your first visit · For nails from another salon

design-per-nail.name: Design / decoration per nail
design-per-nail.desc: Nail art applied on top of your service

in-depth-foot-cleaning.name: In-depth foot cleaning
in-depth-foot-cleaning.desc: Fungus, ingrown nails and special cases

servicios.footnote: One-week warranty on product lift (excluding charms or rhinestones).

diccionario.body: Each technique has its own logic, duration and ideal nail type. A quick guide so you know what to ask for — and why.
diccionario.fallback: You can also message us on WhatsApp if you'd like personal advice.

items.name: Acrylic
items.body: A mix of polymer and liquid monomer molded onto the nail. The classic system: maximum strength and sculpted shape via filing. Ideal for long extensions and architectural designs.

items.name: Polygel
items.body: A moldable paste-gel applied with a dual-form. Lighter than acrylic, feels natural and allows clean extensions. LED-cured — no odor. Recommended for thin nails or anyone seeking discretion.

items.name: Builder gel
items.body: A thick gel cured under UV/LED. A structural layer that protects the natural nail without extending it much. Polished finish, high durability and minimal wear on removal.

items.name: Dipping
items.body: A manicure technique using acrylic powder for a resilient, lightweight and long-lasting finish. Ideal for strong, glossy and natural-looking nails for weeks.

items.name: Semi-permanent
items.body: Long-lasting gel polish cured under a UV/LED lamp. Glossy, lightweight and natural finish — keep your nails flawless from simple designs to creative nail art.

items.name: Press On
items.body: Ready-to-wear nails that deliver a quick manicure in different shapes, lengths and custom designs, with no sculpting required.

team.name: Valentina M.
team.quote: Technique is learned; the eye is trained appointment by appointment.

team.name: Laura R.
team.quote: Every hand tells a different story. I just frame it.

estudio.title2_em: women who love luxury in the details.
estudio.leadItalic: Golden was born from the idea of turning personal care into an experience of comfort and exclusivity — making every woman feel confident, feminine and authentic.
estudio.body1: Our nail artists have mastered every technique we offer: choose your favorite knowing the result will always be stunning.
estudio.body2: We're based in Sabaneta, in a modern, elegant and welcoming space designed for a sophisticated and exclusive experience.

stats.s: Opened in front of the client

hygiene.intro: What others treat as optional, we treat as essential. You'll see it every visit.
items: Every tool we use is sterile.
Every disposable item is discarded after use.
Every material is opened in front of the client.
Surface and UV lamp cleaned between appointments.
The best on the market, for you.
We're dedicated to you until the last minute of your appointment.
